segments.speaker: 题目17/18
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. I just interviewed the director of campus housing for the University newspaper, and she confirmed the rumors. The cost to live in the dormitories will be about 10% higher next year. Oh, wow, that's a lot. I'm wondering if it make sense to start looking for an apartment or something that's not on campus. That's what I'm planning to do. If I come across any good ones I'm not taking. I'll pass them along to you. Awesome. Thanks.
